steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The sentence says the exhibition ______ five generations, listing works from Herrera's great-grandfather, grandmother, mother, niece, and Herrera herself. The blank must mean "extends across" that range of generations.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test all four choices against the meaning "extends across":
  • Choice A — borrows: means to take something from another source — the exhibition does not take from five generations; it features their work. ✗
  • Choice B — spans: means to extend across a range — directly expresses that the exhibition covers five generations. ✓
  • Choice C — judges: means to evaluate or assess — the passage describes what is featured, not a judgment of the works. ✗
  • Choice D — neglects: means to fail to give attention to — contradicts the passage, which says those generations are clearly featured. ✗
That is the correct answer.
